headline: Tornado Warning for Western Oklahoma County
description: A confirmed tornado was reported near Yukon at 14:32 CST. Move to a basement or interior room on the lowest floor of a sturdy building.
instruction: Take shelter immediately. Avoid windows. Stay tuned to local media.

headline: Flash Flood Warning for Harris County
description: Doppler radar indicated thunderstorms producing heavy rain across the county. Flash flooding is expected to begin shortly.
instruction: Do not drive through flooded roadways. Turn around, do not drown.

headline: Wildfire Evacuation Order — Eaton Canyon
description: Mandatory evacuation in effect for residents north of E Mendocino St and east of Lake Ave due to rapidly spreading wildfire.
instruction: Evacuate now via designated routes. Do not return until cleared by fire officials.
